channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Takeaways from Tuesday’s primaries as Democrats try to make Iowa inroads and defend California
item.description: The contours of one of this year’s premier U.S. Senate races are taking shape in Iowa while President Donald Trump’s endorsement streak ran into a roadblock there.

item.title: After decades of rising support, same-sex marriage acceptance may be stalling, Gallup poll shows
Police locked in negotiations with man in Bakersfield holding hostages
